content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.5.1–4.5.3 WARN — HomeKit imported and `HMHomeManager()` instantiated in App/WallpaperGridView.swift:2,5 in a wallpaper app with no home-automation UI or metadata mention (fastlane/metadata/en-US/description.txt only describes wallpapers); this may trigger review questions.
Pierre: Apple restricts HomeKit to apps with a genuine home-automation purpose, and instantiating HMHomeManager prompts the user for home-data access. Here the framework serves no visible feature — the view just lists wallpaper categories — which looks like misuse or leftover code. Remove the HomeKit import and HMHomeManager, or document a real home-related feature before submission.
